narrative: Senior Machine Learning Engineer with eight years at Flipkart, a product‑first retailer, currently based in London. Strong verified skill depth propelled the ranking, reflecting deep expertise in the core technologies. Their hands‑on work with Elasticsearch, Haystack and OpenSearch directly matches the search and retrieval focus of the role, and their product‑company background aligns with the company’s product‑first culture. However, the candidate’s JD‑relevant skill match score is well below the pool average and the location in London adds uncertainty around relocation or remote suitability.
